stemHtml: Which option describes, for a Class B performance category single engine piston aeroplane, a restriction on determining the take-off speed VR?

options.a: V<sub>R</sub> must be equal to or greater than V<sub>SO</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>R</sub> must be equal to or greater than V<sub>S1</sub>.
options.c: V<sub>R</sub> and V<sub>2</sub> both must be equal to or greater than V<sub>S</sub>.
options.d: V<sub>R</sub> must be equal to or greater than V<sub>S</sub> and V<sub>2</sub> must be equal to or greater than 1.3 x V<sub>SO</sub>.
